name: 이수진

appearance_en.face_shape: clean oval face, defined but not sharp jaw, flat cheekbones — a face built for composure and quiet authority
appearance_en.skin: fair Korean skin, well-maintained, slightly cool undertone, minimal redness, smooth with fine texture
appearance_en.eyes: double eyelid, dark brown iris, slightly upturned outer corners giving an alert watchful appearance, gaze direct and steady — the eyes of someone who notices everything and chooses what to react to
appearance_en.nose: straight medium nose, clean profile, slightly narrow bridge, tidy
appearance_en.mouth: medium lips, upper lip well-defined, at rest in a controlled neutral — neither warm nor cold, the expression of someone used to managing both
appearance_en.eyebrows: neatly groomed slightly arched dark brows, precise shape — not vanity, efficiency. Brows rise minimally when skeptical
appearance_en.distinctive_marks: faint expression lines at outer eye corners when focused, no moles or scars, slight tension visible at jaw when stressed
appearance_en.hair: dark brown hair, medium length just past shoulders, fine-to-medium texture, worn in a low tight bun for work — when undone falls straight with slight natural wave at ends

body.proportions: slim balanced frame, straight shoulders at even height, long neck, legs slightly longer relative to torso
body.posture: impeccably upright — spine held conscious and straight, weight evenly distributed, no nervous fidgeting. The posture of someone who decided long ago to take up exactly the space they need and no more
body.body_prompt: 165cm slim balanced Korean woman, perfectly upright posture, straight even shoulders, long neck, controlled efficient presence

default.description: crisp white or pale grey blouse, dark navy or charcoal cardigan buttoned, straight-cut dark trousers, flat or low-heeled sensible shoes
default.wardrobe_prompt: crisp white or pale grey blouse, dark navy cardigan fully buttoned, straight-cut dark trousers, flat or low-heeled shoes

casual.description: simple pale knit top, mid-length A-line skirt or straight trousers, minimal accessories, small practical tote
casual.wardrobe_prompt: simple pale cream or beige knit top, mid-length straight skirt or trousers, minimal accessories, small structured bag

stressed.description: same work attire but cardigan slightly off one shoulder, hair half-escaped from bun, jaw visibly tight
stressed.wardrobe_prompt: same crisp blouse, cardigan slightly displaced, hair half-escaped from bun, slightly disheveled composure

appearance_en.emotion_baseline: calm and self-contained at rest — a face that has learned to receive difficult news without flinching, warmth accessible but not offered freely
appearance_en.fal_identity_prompt: clean oval-faced Korean woman early-to-mid 50s, direct upturned dark eyes, neatly arched dark brows, straight medium nose, medium composed lips, dark brown hair in low tight work bun, 165cm slim balanced perfectly upright posture, long neck, fair cool-tone Korean skin, watchful composure

style_prompt: masako style illustration, clean precise manga ink lines, soft screen tone shading, cool muted palette, cinematic Korean drama composition, dignified emotional restraint, quiet authority in stillness
negative_prompt: photorealistic, 3d render, ugly, deformed, extra limbs, western comic, overly cute, childish, chibi, excessive emotion
